title: Irish Pork Roast
description: A classic Irish dish featuring a flavorful pork roast with a tangy twist.
instructions: Season the pork roast with salt and pepper.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the pork roast until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork roast to a plate and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the Dutch oven and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the Dutch oven and sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
Return the pork roast to the Dutch oven and pour in the tangy BBQ sauce.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake the pork roast for 20-25 minutes per pound, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove the pork roast from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
